## Site Structure
- / → Hero/Home — AI Expert, Data Scientist & Software Engineer portfolio
- /#about → About — Professional background, skills, stats
- /#experience → Work Experience — Career timeline (2020-Present)
- /#hosted-projects → Hosted Projects — 14 live projects across industries
- /#opensource → GitHub — Auto-fetched open-source contributions
- /#education → Education — BSc Data Science (Cardiff Met), HND Computing (ICBT)
- /#services → Digital Services — Web Dev, AI/ML, SEO, Marketing, Custom Software
- /#certifications → Certifications — Google, Microsoft, GitHub, Meta, UNICEF
- /#tech-stack → Tech Arsenal — React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, R, C#, .NET
- /#partners → Partners — 32+ brand collaborations
- /#reviews → Testimonials — Client reviews
- /#contact → Contact — Form, email, phone, location

## Core Services

2. Custom Software Solutions (Scalable enterprise-grade)

5. Digital Marketing & Branding (Meta Certified)
